qa_pairs.question: What was the operational status of the Niagara and Mist clusters between January 6 and September 16, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: From January 6 to September 16, 2025, the Niagara cluster operated at approximately 50% capacity, and the Mist cluster operated at approximately 35% capacity. This reduction was implemented to support ongoing system improvements and the transition to the Trillium system. Mist also required a temporary shutdown for a few hours on January 6.

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of the Rorqual compute cluster on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: On September 3, 2025, the Rorqual compute cluster was fully unavailable for a one-day scheduled maintenance outage.
